name: Grilled Lobster with Warm Corn, Chanterelle and Bacon Salad
recipeInstructions:
Lobster:
1. In a bowl, stir basil into melted butter.
2. Steam or broil lobsters for about 4 minutes.
3. Shock the lobsters with cold water and allow them to cool.
4. Heat grill to a moderately high heat.
5. Split lobsters in half.
6. Remove meat from claws.
7. Lightly brush meat with basil butter.
8. Place lobsters on grill, meat side down for 3-4 minutes.
9. Turn over and brush meat liberally with more butter.
10. Continue grilling for 3-4 minutes with shell side down until shell is bright red.
11. Place claw meat on grill and cook for 3-4 minutes.
12. Remove lobsters from grill.
Salad:
1. In a large non-stick pan, cook bacon until crispy. Drain and set aside.
2. In the same pan, heat 1 tablespoon olive oil and saute Chanterelles until golden brown. Season lightly with salt and pepper and set aside.
3. Add another tablespoon of oil to the pan.
4. Add corn and onion and cook for 2-3 minutes until corn is cooked and onion is tender.
5. Add peppers and toss until peppers are warm.
6. Add mushrooms and frisee to pan. Toss for 1 minute.
7. Add remaining oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper to taste.
8. Toss together until frisee just begins to wilt.
9. Add bacon and serve with lobster.
